Maritime, Offshore and industrial spare parts, supplied globally

The right part,
sourced on any timeline.

Genuine, OEM and alternative spare parts for marine, offshore, and industrial equipment. Fast lead times, emergency orders, obsolete parts tracked down. New or used. Delivered globally.

Hundreds of brands. One supplier.

From engine components to navigation electronics, pumps, sensors, and auxiliary equipment, across every major brand. Have a part number? Browse our parts reference catalog →

Built for maritime procurement

Parts for vessels and industrial plants are often hard to find, time-critical, or both.

Emergency sourcing, globally

When a vessel needs a part now, we source it. Our global network of stockists covers emergency timelines across all major engine and equipment brands.

Obsolete parts specialists

Even discontinued items. If a part truly cannot be sourced, we help identify compatible replacements.

Full logistics management

We handle land, sea, and air freight, including customs optimisation for VAT and import duties. Proper documentation & experience for customs clearance.

Genuine, OEM, Aftermarket, Used or New

We source genuine, OEM-equivalent, aftermarket, and quality-tested used parts and advise on the right fit for your timeline, budget, and criticality.

Freight, customs, and documentation.
Fully managed.

We handle land, sea, and air freight, customs clearance, and full documentation from supplier to your vessel or facility.

Land
Sea
Air
Customs
Contact Us
ASIL TRADING

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
